proposal1.heroHeadline: Gmail is losing $500,000 annually on manual proposal processes. Let's stop the bleeding.
proposal1.heroSubheadline: Currently, proposals take hours of manual effort. Our system delivers them in under 60 seconds.
proposal1.problemsIntro: These are not just inefficiencies, they are ongoing financial losses.

problems.title: Time Drain
problems.description: Each proposal takes an average of 3 hours. That's 3 hours not spent improving Gmail's core services.

problems.title: High Labor Costs
problems.description: Every hour spent on proposals costs Gmail around $50 in labor. Multiply that by thousands of proposals annually.

problems.title: Lost Opportunities
problems.description: Delayed proposals mean delayed deals. Every day a proposal is late risks Gmail's competitive edge.

problems.title: Inconsistent Branding
problems.description: Manual proposals lead to branding inconsistencies. This undermines Gmail's image as intuitive and efficient.

problems.title: Proposal Errors
problems.description: Human errors in proposals can cost Gmail up to $10,000 per mistake. Errors damage reputation and client trust.

problems.title: Resource Misallocation
problems.description: Valuable resources diverted to proposal writing could be enhancing Gmail's intuitive services.

proposal1.solutionIntro: Our AI system replaces these losses with precision and speed.

solutions.title: Instant Proposal Generation
solutions.description: Currently, proposals require hours of manual work. Our system automates this in under 60 seconds.

solutions.title: Consistent Branding
solutions.description: Brand inconsistencies undermine Gmail's image. Our system ensures every proposal aligns with Gmail's branding.

solutions.title: Error Reduction
solutions.description: Manual processes risk costly mistakes. Our AI minimizes errors, protecting Gmail's reputation.

solutions.title: Cost Efficiency
solutions.description: Manual processes are labor-intensive and costly. Our system drastically reduces labor costs.

solutions.title: Enhanced Focus
solutions.description: Resources spent on proposals detract from Gmail's core focus. Our system frees up resources for innovation.

proposal1.whyUsIntro: Four reasons this works. Not marketing claims. Engineering facts.

whyUsCards.title: Speed
whyUsCards.description: Every hour your team spends writing proposals is an hour not spent closing deals. This system gives those hours back. Lead data in, live proposal out, 60 seconds.

whyUsCards.title: Personalization
whyUsCards.description: Generic proposals get ignored. Personalized proposals close. The system reads each prospect's website and reflects their services, tone, and positioning back to them. Written from scratch, not templated.

whyUsCards.title: Ownership
whyUsCards.description: No monthly subscription bleeding your budget. No vendor deciding to raise prices or shut down. You own the source code, the infrastructure, and the data. Permanently.

whyUsCards.title: Support
whyUsCards.description: Personal onboarding, a video walkthrough your team can reference anytime, and one week of post-delivery support. You are not left figuring this out alone.

fearCards.title: You are probably thinking: our stack is complicated.
fearCards.sub: CRM, email, Sheets, Slack. The system connects to whatever you already use. No migration.

fearCards.title: You might be wondering if this breaks your current workflow.
fearCards.sub: It runs alongside everything you have. Nothing changes except the time you spend on proposals.

fearCards.title: You are concerned the output will not match your standards.
fearCards.sub: Revisions are part of the build. We configure, test, and refine until the output matches your bar exactly.

proposal1.teamIntro: Your point of contact. No handoffs, no account managers, no layers.

team.name: Ayush Chauhan
team.bio: Full-stack engineer specializing in AI automation for agencies and service businesses. Every engagement personally handled from architecture through deployment. 15+ systems built. Zero failed deliveries. Works async, ships fast.

proposal1.processIntro: What Working With Us Looks Like

process.title: Kickoff (Async or Call)
process.description: We map your workflow, services, and current proposal process. Can be a 15-minute call or handled entirely over email. By the end, we have everything needed to configure the system.

process.title: System Configuration
process.description: The engine gets configured with your services, pricing structure, tone of voice, and brand standards. Every proposal it generates will sound like your best strategist wrote it.

process.title: Build and QA
process.description: Test proposals generated and reviewed against your quality bar. Refinements continue until the output is indistinguishable from what your team produces manually.

process.title: Deployment and Handoff
process.description: Deployed to production with full infrastructure. You receive a video walkthrough, documentation, and complete source code. From this point, the system runs without us.

proposal1.pricingIntro: Two options. Both are one-time builds. No subscriptions, no recurring fees. You own the source code and infrastructure permanently.

pricing.name: Proposal Engine
pricing.subtitle: // Core System
pricing.description: Custom proposal automation configured for Gmail's services, voice, and pricing structure.

pricing.name: Engine + AI Chatbot
pricing.subtitle: // Recommended
pricing.description: Everything above, plus an AI sales assistant embedded in every proposal. Handles objections, answers questions, and books calls for Gmail around the clock.
features: AI chatbot on every proposal page

proposal1.ctaHeadline: See this running on your actual proposals.
proposal1.ctaDescription: Reply here or email Ayush directly. He will send the onboarding form. Takes about 10 minutes and the build starts the same day. Custom-configured for Gmail.

proposal2.heroHeadline: Transform Acme Corp's Efficiency with Gmail's Intuitive Email Platform
proposal2.heroSubheadline: Leverage Gmail's 15 GB of storage and mobile access for seamless communication within Acme Corp. Our plan focuses on improving email management and reducing spam to enhance productivity.
proposal2.problemsIntro: Acme Corp is currently experiencing losses due to inefficiencies in communication.

problems.title: Inefficient Email Management
problems.description: With outdated email systems, Acme Corp could be losing 20% in productivity. Employees waste time managing cluttered inboxes.

problems.title: Security Breaches
problems.description: Every security breach is a potential loss of client trust, leading to a 15% drop in customer retention. Secure email is crucial.

problems.title: High Spam Volume
problems.description: Acme Corp receives high spam volumes, leading to 10% of important emails being missed. This can result in lost business opportunities.

problems.title: Limited Storage Space
problems.description: With limited storage, critical emails are deleted to save space, potentially losing 5% of valuable information.

problems.title: Poor Mobile Accessibility
problems.description: Without efficient mobile access, on-the-go productivity drops by 25%, affecting overall business performance.

problems.title: Lack of Integration
problems.description: Without seamless integration with other tools, Acme Corp could lose 30% efficiency in operations, impacting revenue.

proposal2.solutionIntro: Our solutions directly address these losses by enhancing email management and security.

solutions.title: Intuitive Email Platform
solutions.description: Gmail offers 15 GB of storage, reducing time spent managing emails. This improves efficiency and productivity.

solutions.title: Enhanced Security
solutions.description: Gmail's security features protect against breaches, safeguarding client trust and maintaining customer retention.

solutions.title: Mobile Access
solutions.description: Our mobile-friendly interface ensures employees can access emails seamlessly, maintaining productivity on-the-go.

solutions.title: Seamless Integration
solutions.description: Gmail integrates with other tools, boosting operational efficiency and enhancing revenue potential.

proposal2.whyUsIntro: Gmail is trusted for its intuitive and efficient email solutions.

whyUsCards.title: Proven Expertise
whyUsCards.description: Gmail has a history of transforming businesses with reliable email solutions.

whyUsCards.title: Focus on Security
whyUsCards.description: Our advanced security features ensure your data remains protected at all times.

whyUsCards.title: Boosted Productivity
whyUsCards.description: With Gmail, enhance your team's productivity through streamlined email management.

whyUsCards.title: Global Reach
whyUsCards.description: Our solutions are designed for businesses of all sizes, everywhere.

proposal2.teamIntro: Meet the team committed to Acme Corp's success.

team.name: there
team.bio: Leading strategy and client relationships with over a decade of experience in email solutions.

proposal2.processIntro: What Working With Us Looks Like

process.title: Discovery Phase
process.description: Understanding Acme Corp's unique needs and setting objectives.

process.title: Implementation
process.description: Deploying Gmail solutions tailored to your requirements.

process.title: Review and Feedback
process.description: Reviewing outcomes and planning for future improvements.

proposal2.pricingIntro: Choose from our investment options designed for Acme Corp's growth.

pricing.name: Basic Plan
pricing.description: Ideal for small teams looking to improve email productivity.

pricing.name: Pro Plan
pricing.description: Recommended for teams seeking enhanced security and integration.

pricing.name: Enterprise Plan
pricing.description: Best for large organizations requiring comprehensive email solutions.

proposal2.ctaDescription: Let's chat about how Gmail can support Acme Corp. No commitments, just a conversation.
